title: GATE-4-FIX-V2 record
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = "\n"
patch_sha = '8cba218e7a842e7f8baf7d0a145b0e7978a0e93f'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8')) if queue_path.exists() else {'tasks': []}
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-4-FIX-V2':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = patch_sha
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T16:20:09Z'
        task['deploy_required'] = True
        task['test_required'] = True
if not any(t.get('id') == 'GATE-4-TEST-V2' for t in queue.get('tasks', [])):
    queue.setdefault('tasks', []).append({'id':'GATE-4-TEST-V2','title':'Test Telegram inbox receipt after Deno deploy','status':'WAITING_OPERATOR_TELEGRAM_MESSAGE','priority':1,'depends_on':['GATE-4-FIX-V2'],'criteria':'Operator sends Telegram message; bot responds inbox success; governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl contains appended JSON line','touch_workflows':False})
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T16:23:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'WAITING_OPERATOR_TELEGRAM_MESSAGE'
queue['next_action'] = 'after Deno Deploy picks up patch, operator sends test message to @BarberStaffBot'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T16:20:09Z','id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_telegram_inbox_patch_anchor','sha':patch_sha,'status':'done','change':'telegram_to_inbox_jsonl','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + NL
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE4_FIX_V2_RECORD_PATCH_RESULT.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2-RECORD','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_record_patch_result','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'GATE-4-FIX-V2','recorded_sha':patch_sha,'next':'GATE-4-TEST-V2 wait for deploy and operator Telegram test','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE4_FIX_V2_RECORD_PATCH_RESULT.md')
report.write_text('# GATE-4-FIX-V2 | Record patch result' + NL + 'Status: completed' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'Recorded Telegram inbox patch SHA ' + patch_sha + '. Next task is GATE-4-TEST-V2: after Deno Deploy updates, send a Telegram test message and verify inbox append.' + NL + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
